content: The Self-Refine iterative self-feedback framework for output improvement can be grounded in multiple inconsistent problem-solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-refinement system that leverages both intra-perspective iteration and inter-perspective contrast to boost output quality without additional training or supervision. This hybrid system fixes the limitation of standard Self-Refine that can get stuck in local blind spots of a single LLM's default reasoning perspective.
